name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS TLC

CONSTANT N
CONSTANT StateSet

VARIABLE state

Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

IdleToTrying(p) == 
  /\ state[p] = "idle"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]

TryingToCritical(p) == 
  /\ state[p] = "trying"
  /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => state[q] # "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]

CriticalToIdle(p) == 
  /\ state[p] = "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]

Next == \E p \in 1..N : 
          IdleToTrying(p) \/ TryingToCritical(p) \/ CriticalToIdle(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> StateSet]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* --definitions-- *)
Right(i) == IF i < N THEN i + 1 ELSE 1

(* --type definitions-- *)
Forks == [1..N -> 0..N]          (* 0 = free, otherwise owner philosopher id *)
PhilosopherState == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}
States == [1..N -> PhilosopherState]

(* --initialization-- *)
Init == 
  /\ forks \in Forks
  /\ state \in States
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* --actions-- *)
ThinkToHungry(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

PickUp(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ forks[i] = 0
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutDown(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks[i] = i
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    (ThinkToHungry(i) \/ PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i))

(* --specification-- *)
vars == <<forks, state>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

(* --type invariant-- *)
TypeOK == 
  forks \in Forks /\ state \in States
